text:
Created attachment 241947
git diff patch file

Hi Robert,


Thanks for your response.

I added a new patch file to this issue.

The command `make makepatch` did not created any patch/diff file for me.
The change is just related to the Makefile, Makefile.crates and distinfo. No further changes are required for update this port.

I just followed https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/upgrading/#git-diff
